expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse response status='success' and treat code=20 as a successful edit-config operation.
Adapter MUST confirm the log-setting attribute of rule RULE-001 was updated to 'default-logging-profile'.
Adapter MUST distinguish an edit (action=edit) from a create (action=set) in its audit trail.
Adapter MUST NOT activate the updated rule; the change remains in candidate config until an explicit commit.
Adapter MUST record the xpath of the modified node so the drift-detection baseline can be updated.

primary_citation.quote: The edit command replaces an existing node in the configuration. Use action=edit to overwrite a specific element at the given xpath.

provenance.sanitization: API key replaced with <API-KEY>. Host replaced with pa-test.example.com (synthetic). Log-setting profile name is synthetic. No real PAN-OS device or production config captured.
